body:
Seen again [here](https://github.com/coder/coder/actions/runs/9807758845/job/27082164662) but with a different error:

```
 === FAIL: codersdk/workspacesdk TestTailnetAPIConnector_Disconnects (0.10s)
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.282 [debu]  dialing Coder tailnet v2+ API
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.284 [debu]  obtained tailnet API v2+ client
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.297 [debu]  serving coordinator
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.297 [debu]  starting tailnet Coordinate  peer_id={"Name":"client","ID":"66000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","Auth":{"AgentID":"55000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}}  name=client
    t.go:102: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.298 [erro]  error receiving DERP Map  error=EOF
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.298 [debu]  tailnet API v2+ connection lost
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.298 [debu]  loopResp failed to get response  peer_id={"Name":"client","ID":"66000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","Auth":{"AgentID":"55000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}}  name=client  error="context canceled"
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.298 [debu]  error receiving requests from DRPC stream  peer_id={"Name":"client","ID":"66000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","Auth":{"AgentID":"55000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}}  name=client  error="context canceled"
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.380 [debu]  dialing Coder tailnet v2+ API
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.380 [debu]  obtained tailnet API v2+ client
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.381 [debu]  serving coordinator
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.381 [debu]  starting tailnet Coordinate  peer_id={"Name":"client","ID":"66000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","Auth":{"AgentID":"55000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}}  name=client
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.381 [debu]  main context canceled; do graceful disconnect
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.381 [debu]  sent disconnect
    t.go:99: 2024-07-05 11:46:07.381 [debu]  error receiving requests from DRPC stream  peer_id={"Name":"client","ID":"66000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","Auth":{"AgentID":"55000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}}  name=client  error="context canceled"
    connector_internal_test.go:105: 
        	Error Trace:	/home/runner/work/coder/coder/codersdk/workspacesdk/connector_internal_test.go:105
        	Error:      	Expected value not to be nil.
        	Test:       	TestTailnetAPIConnector_Disconnects
```

https://github.com/coder/coder/actions/runs/10254091760/job/28368133242?pr=14172

```
=== Failed
=== FAIL: codersdk/workspacesdk TestTailnetAPIConnector_Disconnects (0.10s)
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.131 [debu]  dialing Coder tailnet v2+ API
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.134 [debu]  obtained tailnet API v2+ client
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.136 [debu]  serving coordinator
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.136 [debu]  starting tailnet Coordinate  peer_id={"Name":"client","ID":"66000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","Auth":{"AgentID":"55000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}}  name=client
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.137 [debu]  tailnet API v2+ connection lost
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.137 [debu]  loopResp failed to get response  peer_id={"Name":"client","ID":"66000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","Auth":{"AgentID":"55000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}}  name=client  error="context canceled"
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.137 [debu]  error receiving requests from DRPC stream  peer_id={"Name":"client","ID":"66000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","Auth":{"AgentID":"55000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}}  name=client  error="context canceled"
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.219 [debu]  dialing Coder tailnet v2+ API
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.219 [debu]  obtained tailnet API v2+ client
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.223 [debu]  serving coordinator
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.223 [debu]  starting tailnet Coordinate  peer_id={"Name":"client","ID":"66000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","Auth":{"AgentID":"55000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}}  name=client
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.224 [debu]  main context canceled; do graceful disconnect
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.224 [debu]  sent disconnect
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.224 [debu]  loopResp failed to get response  peer_id={"Name":"client","ID":"66000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","Auth":{"AgentID":"55000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}}  name=client  error="context canceled"
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.224 [debu]  tailnet API v2+ connection lost
    t.go:99: 2024-08-05 18:31:13.226 [debu]  error receiving requests from DRPC stream  peer_id={"Name":"client","ID":"66000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000","Auth":{"AgentID":"55000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}}  name=client  error="context canceled"
    connector_internal_test.go:105: 
        	Error Trace:	C:/a/coder/coder/codersdk/workspacesdk/connector_internal_test.go:105
        	Error:      	Expected value not to be nil.
        	Test:       	TestTailnetAPIConnector_Disconnects
```

I can't help but wonder if there is a real product bug here such that we're closing either the websocket, yamux session, or coordinate stream immediately after sending `Disconnect`, and this is causing the message not to make it to the server.

We should send disconnect, and then wait for the server to hang up on us.
